Petition To Approve And Authorize Execution Of Settlement Agreement Under Probate Code Â§ 17200(B)(6)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Murry for Thomas Colletta (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court granted the Petition to Approve and Authorize Execution of Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Construction of Trust Declaration and Last Will and Testament was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Approve And Authorize Execution Of Settlement Agreement Under Probate Code Â§ 17200(B)(6)
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Murry for petitioner Thomas Colletta.

The court expressed concern about Mr. Colletta having limited authority as a temporary trustee and no authority to enter into a settlement agreement, a legacy entity is not currently in existence, concern about David and Thomas working together and that the approximately $7,000.00 per year in residuals may not warrant the economics involved. It was suggested that there may be a more practical approach to dealing with the royalties such as assigning it to a charity or a restricted gift. Mr. Murry suggested an ex parte petition granting Mr. Colletta authority to execute a settlement agreement, and also explained which assets are in the estate matter (PES-14-297884). The court stated that it was not sure it could approve a settlement of the estate in the trust matter and that a petition for approval of the settlement agreement would be needed in the estate matter. The petition to approve and authorize execution of settlement agreement and the petition for construction of trust declaration, etc., was continued to August 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 in conjunction with the other case.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
